name: genesect
flavor_texts: Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma.
This ancient bug Pokémon was altered by Team Plasma. They upgraded the cannon on its back.
This Pokémon existed 300 million years ago. Team Plasma altered it and attached a cannon to its back.
text: Genesect is the Paleozoic Pokémon. It is a bug and steel-type Pokémon. Abilities: download. Base stats — HP: 71, Attack: 120, Defense: 95, Sp. Atk: 120, Sp. Def: 95, Speed: 99. Evolution line: genesect. Lore: Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma. This ancient bug Pokémon was altered by Team Plasma. They upgraded the cannon on its back. This Pokémon existed 300 million years ago. Team Plasma altered it and attached a cannon to its back.
